prerequisites: An eBay Developers Program account with an application keyset (App ID / Client ID and Cert ID / Client Secret) generated in the developer portal.
An eBay seller account whose finance data will be read; provide it in the username field.
A configured redirect (RuName / accepted redirect URI) registered for the application, supplied in redirect_uri.
A user OAuth refresh token minted through eBay's authorization code grant flow, supplied in refresh_token.
The API host to target (production or sandbox) for api_host, and a start_date marking the earliest transaction date to sync.
The token refresh endpoint URL for token_refresh_endpoint (production: https://api.ebay.com/identity/v1/oauth2/token).

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 user access token (authorization code grant)
authMethods.summary: The eBay Finances API requires a user access token created with the authorization code grant flow. The connector stores the long-lived refresh_token and exchanges it at the token_refresh_endpoint (https://api.ebay.com/identity/v1/oauth2/token) for short-lived access tokens. The redirect_uri must match the application's registered RuName / redirect, and the sell.finances scope (https://api.ebay.com/oauth/api_scope/sell.finances) must be granted. client_access_token optionally holds a current access token.

authMethods.name: eBay user account credential
authMethods.summary: The eBay seller account is identified by username; the connector also accepts a password secret field for that account. The authorization code grant flow requires an eBay user to authorize the application before a refresh token can be minted.

setupSteps.title: Create an eBay developer application keyset
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the eBay Developers Program and create an application to obtain your keyset: App ID (Client ID) and Cert ID (Client Secret). These identify your application during the OAuth token exchange.

setupSteps.title: Register a redirect (RuName) and grant the Finances scope
setupSteps.body: Configure a redirect / RuName for your application and request the sell.finances OAuth scope (https://api.ebay.com/oauth/api_scope/sell.finances). Set the connector's redirect_uri to the registered redirect value.

setupSteps.title: Mint a user refresh token via the authorization code grant
setupSteps.body: Have the eBay seller authorize your application. Exchange the returned authorization code at https://api.ebay.com/identity/v1/oauth2/token to obtain a user access token and a long-lived refresh token. Put the refresh token in refresh_token; optionally place a current access token in client_access_token.

setupSteps.title: Configure connector fields
setupSteps.body: Set api_host to the target API host (production or sandbox), token_refresh_endpoint to the eBay OAuth token URL, username to the eBay seller account, redirect_uri to your registered RuName, and start_date to the earliest transaction date to sync. The connector refreshes access tokens automatically using refresh_token against token_refresh_endpoint.
